status: created in Penpot on 2026-05-26; old generated boards removed

frames.name: SHELLV3-00 Navigation map
frames.purpose: Show the reduced shell model: Login -> Cockpit -> Logout/session ended.
frames.acceptance: No Client Overview, Public View, or Project Info route appears as a separate shell destination.

frames.name: SHELLV3-01 Login
frames.purpose: Authenticate before any scoped data is visible.
frames.acceptance: No authenticated sidebar or scoped data appears before login.

frames.name: SHELLV3-02 Logout or session ended
frames.purpose: Clear scoped data and return the user to login.
frames.acceptance: No sidebar, context, accelerator action, or secret reveal is available after logout.

frames.name: SHELLV3-03 Project Cockpit
frames.purpose: Single authenticated cockpit with Context Selector, Project Info, and Accelerators.
regions: persistent sidebar with Cockpit, accelerators, Admin, and Dev Tools only
top bar with active context, Light/Dark, user menu, and Logout
Context Selector macro group defining Public vs Client/domain and environment
Project Info macro group inside Cockpit
frames.acceptance: Sidebar contains no Client Overview, Public View, or Project Info route; these are handled inside the Cockpit.
